title: Kaya Gives the Straw Hats a Ship
description: On pages 2–5, Syrup Village moves from battle to farewell as Usopp, Kaya, and the Straw Hats decide what comes after Kuro’s defeat.
scene: The danger has passed, but the emotional weight remains: Usopp must choose between staying with the village that knows his lies and chasing the sea like his father.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: idiot... it's because your throat isn't trained enough to handle fish bones

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If you eat a fish, this is what usually remains

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh, so this is where you guys are...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't you need to stay in bed?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I've been sick like this for a year

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ever since I lost my parents that day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's why I can't be so weak now

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I heard that you guys needed a ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A ship! You're gonna give us one?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's time to say good bye to this house....!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: When I finally managed to stuff every- thing in!!

summary: This part closes Syrup Village by turning Usopp’s lies into a bittersweet farewell, while Kaya’s gift helps the Straw Hats continue their voyage.
